explanation: The user instructs to pick up the knife and then slice the tomato. The knife is initially on top of the fridge, so I need to go to the fridge to pick it up. After picking up the knife, I need to go to the tomato, which is on the countertop. Once I am at the tomato, I can slice it. The slicing action requires the knife to be held, which is already ensured by the pick-up step. The old plan only involved placing the tomato, so this new plan starts with navigating to the knife, picking it up, moving to the tomato, and slicing it.
